evals.prompt: Mine the last year of this repo and tell me the three ways we repeatedly break production, with tests we should add.
evals.expected_output: Uses traceable history, reconstructs mechanisms conservatively, checks current defenses, and recommends specific regression coverage.

evals.prompt: Why do our database migrations keep needing hotfixes? Build a failure museum from commits and incident docs.
evals.expected_output: Clusters migration failure mechanisms and distinguishes evidence, inference, existing defenses, and missing controls.
